ci_workflow_improvements.description: PR #417 closed - superseded by #411 (merged by askpt) and #425 (ci-coach per-component filtering)

notes: PR #411 (CI improvements incl. path filters, concurrency, least-privilege) was merged by askpt on 2026-03-01. PR #417 (Repo Assist CI PR) was closed as superseded. Dependabot PRs #384 and #339 still open. Issue #424 (ci-coach per-component path filtering) created 2026-03-02; PR #425 implements it. Commented on #424 and labeled with enhancement. March 2026 monthly summary is issue #413.
